form.newsletter: I agree to receive tips and news from Zoé by email.

cadeau.label: Gift card · Zowe
cadeau.title: Give the Zowe experience
cadeau.desc: Give your loved ones an exceptional care experience. A rare gesture that leaves a lasting impression.
cadeau.cta_text: Zoé prepares every gift card with care. Contact her directly to arrange the details.
cadeau.hint: Select one or more treatments, then send your message to Zoé.

gallery.empty: The gallery will be available soon.

session.sub: Everything you need to know to approach your session with peace of mind.

merci.title: Message received.
merci.sub1: Zoé will get back to you today
merci.sub2: to arrange a time that suits you. In the meantime, feel free to reach her directly.
merci.wa_text: Hello Zoé, I would like to know more about the Zowe experience.

reserver.title: Book a Precision Assessment
reserver.subtitle: The starting point of your Zowe experience.
reserver.card_desc: During this first appointment, Zoé evaluates your needs, analyses your movements and establishes a personalised programme — the founding step of your journey.
reserver.card_note: Subsequent sessions (postural assessment, rehabilitation…) will be defined with Zoé during this first appointment.

steps.title: Select the treatment
steps.desc: Choose the Beltra treatment from the list of treatments offered by Zoé Grêde.

steps.title: Confirm your slot
steps.desc: Choose the day and time that suits you, fill in your details and confirm. You will receive a confirmation email from KinoQuick.
